# OnDemand Leaders

> OnDemand Leaders is the consultancy of Christopher Schafer (also known as Chili), a transition operator who fixes broken revenue engines. He embeds as a fractional CRO, interim revenue leader, or interim President to find revenue and move the team through the change to keep it. He has 25 years in SaaS go-to-market leadership across North America and APAC, including a key global leadership role at NetSuite as it scaled from roughly $30M to $1B-plus through its IPO and the $9.3B Oracle acquisition, and most recently President at ImportGenius. He runs OnDemand Leaders with his wife Elisha Schafer and co-authored the HELP Operating System with her. Based in the Greater Toronto Area, Ontario, Canada. Works with publicly traded global firms down to early startups across manufacturing, distribution, services, and technology.

The pattern that matters is never the industry. It is "the problem is real, the team is willing, and they are stuck." Chris moves them through it. He fixes fast, and the real product is teaching the team to fix it themselves so the company can adapt next time without him.

## Start here
- [About Chris Schafer](https://ondemandleaders.com/about): full background, track record, and how he works.
- [How I Work](https://ondemandleaders.com/how-i-work): the engagement model and the HELP Operating System (Hear, Evidence, Learn, Proceed).
- [Apply](https://ondemandleaders.com/apply): book a free 15-minute call on Fridays or a deeper working session.

## Services
- [Revenue Leader Mentorship](https://ondemandleaders.com/revenue-leader-mentorship): mentoring for revenue leaders who need pattern recognition, not replacement.
- [Public Speaking](https://ondemandleaders.com/public-speaking): keynotes and talks on revenue turnaround, leadership, and selling in the age of AI.
- [Strategic Session](https://ondemandleaders.com/strategic-session): a focused working session on a specific revenue problem.

## Think Tank (long-form research)
- [A stuck company is almost always a blind one](https://ondemandleaders.com/think-tank/revenue-turnaround-case-study): an anonymized revenue turnaround run on the HELP Operating System.
- [The Best-Customer Engine](https://ondemandleaders.com/think-tank/best-customer-engine): study your most profitable client, size the look-alike market, and rebuild the company to win that one profile.
- [Canada's Value Capture Gap](https://ondemandleaders.com/think-tank/canada-value-capture): why Canada exports its resources and buys them back at a premium, and what to change.
- [The Education Three Cs](https://ondemandleaders.com/think-tank/education-three-cs): Curiosity, Communication, and Confirmation, the skills schools were not built to teach.

## The Bird's Eye (articles)
- [Fractional CRO vs Interim CRO](https://ondemandleaders.com/blog/fractional-cro-vs-interim-cro): the difference between the two roles and when to hire each.
- [Why Profitable Companies Stall](https://ondemandleaders.com/blog/why-profitable-companies-stall): how profit can hide a growth problem.
- [All articles](https://ondemandleaders.com/blog/): the full index.

## People
- [Christopher Schafer](https://ondemandleaders.com/about): founder, fractional CRO, and GTM turnaround operator.
- [Elisha Schafer](https://ondemandleaders.com/elisha): co-founder, behavioural scientist, and psychotherapist behind the HELP Operating System.
